# AdChannelType

**Type**

The channel type of an ad in a campaign.

## Declaration

```swift
string AdChannelType
```

## Discussion

See also [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/BillingEventType] and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Campaign] object.

## Data Types

- **BillingEventType**: The type of billing event for a campaign.
- **CampaignCountryOrRegionsServingStateReasons**: Reasons that displays when a campaign can’t run.
- **CampaignDisplayStatus**: The status of the campaign.
- **CampaignServingStateReasons**: Reasons the system provides when a campaign can’t run.
- **CampaignServingStatus**: The status of the campaign.
- **CampaignStatus**: The status of the campaign.
- **PaymentModel**: The payment model that you set.
- **SupplySource**: The ad placements for a campaign.
